{/* Hero Section */}

Microsoft 365 & Azure Administrator

Cloud Infrastructure Specialist | DevOps Enthusiast | Automation Expert
Helping businesses secure, automate and optimize their cloud environments.

Hire Me View Work
{/* About Section */}

About Me

Based in India, I specialize in Microsoft 365 administration, Azure cloud services, identity & security management, compliance solutions, and enterprise collaboration tools. I design scalable and secure cloud architectures that align with business goals.

With strong hands-on experience in DevOps practices and AWS cloud fundamentals, I help organizations automate deployments, implement CI/CD pipelines, and enhance operational efficiency.

{/* Skills Section */}
